message:
refactor(search): extract thread ID parsing, facet lookup, and budget tier helpers

Add three focused utility functions to reduce inline complexity
in search diagnostics:
- parse_thread_ids(): splits comma-separated thread ID strings
  with trim and empty filtering
- explain_facet_value(): looks up a facet key in QueryExplain's
  facets_applied list using case-insensitive key matching
- parse_budget_tier_from_rerank_outcome(): extracts the tier
  suffix from skipped_by_budget_governor_* rerank outcomes

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
